op_currency_tooltip: OP is our digital currency. Earn OP by completing tasks, focus sessions, and daily streaks. Spend OP on premium features and marketplace items.
op_faq_what_answer: OP (Optimization Points) is Optiverse's digital currency system that rewards you for productivity and engagement. It's earned through completing tasks, maintaining focus sessions, and building streaks.
op_faq_how_answer: Complete tasks • Maintain focus sessions • Build daily streaks • Achieve milestones • Complete achievements • Participate in challenges
op_faq_cashout: Can I withdraw OP to real money?
op_faq_cashout_answer: OP is used exclusively within Optiverse for premium features, marketplace items, and exclusive content. Currently, direct cashout is not available, but OP can unlock valuable digital rewards and benefits.
leave_video_call_message: Are you sure you want to leave the video call? The call will be disconnected.
